03

Ratings & Targets

Elevate your standing in global sustainability indices. We manage your performance across EcoVadis, CDP, and SBTi to ensure your corporate ratings reflect your true commitment to excellence.

Improve My Rating

What's Included

Strategic support for global sustainability benchmarks.

EcoVadis Submission & Rating Optimization
CDP Climate Change & Water Response
Supply Chain ESG Risk Mapping
Institutional Rating (MSCI/DJSI) Support

The rating dilemma

Low ratings can lead to lost contracts and higher financing costs.

01

Complex Questionnaires

CDP and EcoVadis surveys are massive, technical, and require deep evidence-based answers that generic teams often struggle to provide.

02

Evidence Misalignment

Many companies have the right policies but fail to present "evidence" in the specific format required by global rating agencies.

03

Benchmark Competition

Your competitors are improving. Staying at a "Bronze" or "Silver" level while the industry moves to "Gold" is a competitive disadvantage.

The Scoring Protocol

A technical approach to reaching the top tier.

01

Diagnostic

  • Past Score Analysis
  • Peer Benchmarking
  • Gap Identification
02

Evidence

  • Policy Drafting
  • Data Consolidation
  • System Audit
03

Submission

  • Expert Response
  • Proof Validation
  • Strategy Review
04

Optimization

  • Corrective Actions
  • Strategy Update
  • Year-on-year Growth

Rating Assets

Deliverables focused on immediate score improvement.

EcoVadis Gold Strategy
CDP 'A' List Roadmap
Evidence Management System
Policy Library

Benchmarking Frameworks

Technical requirements for global sustainability leadership.

Rating Methodologies
  • EcoVadis v4.0 Environment, Labor, Ethics & Spend metrics
  • CDP Questionnaire C-Suite governance & risk-opportunity modeling
  • S&P Global CSA DJSI index inclusion criteria support
  • Refinitiv ESG Relative performance based on 450+ data points
Target Validation
  • SBTi Near-Term 5-10 year emission reduction pathways
  • SBTi Net-Zero 90% absolute reduction by 2050
  • FLAG Targets Forest, Land and Agriculture specific metrics
  • RE100 Commitment to 100% renewable electricity

Ratings FAQs

Closing the loop on sustainability performance assessment.

EcoVadis scores depend on three pillars: Policies, Actions, and Results. Many companies fail by only providing policies. We help you document the *Actions* (e.g., training logs, energy audits) and *Results* (e.g., 3-year performance trends) required to reach Silver, Gold, or Platinum medals.
The SBTi process typically takes 6 to 12 months. This includes 2-3 months for inventory and target modeling, the submission of the "Commitment Letter," and a 30-day technical validation period by the SBTi team. We manage the entire technical liaison to ensure first-time approval.
Over 700+ institutional investors with US$130 trillion in assets request CDP disclosures. A high CDP score (B or A) reduces cost of capital and is increasingly a prerequisite for major supplier contracts in the EU and North America. It demonstrates climate-resilient governance.
Yes. After receiving your scorecard, EcoVadis provides a list of "Corrective Action Plans." We help you implement the missing policies and controls (e.g., whistleblowing procedures, anti-corruption training) to address these gaps before your next reassessment.
EcoVadis Partner CDP Accredited SBTi Tech Support S&P Global Aligned
